subparts.text: Explain the purpose of cores and chaplets?
What is the difference between conventional and non-conventional welding?
Define cold working and hot working? Give two examples which are carried by cold working?
In what cases Investment casting is being used? Also explain in short.
How is additive manufacturing different from subtractive manufacturing?
What are advantages of manufacturing using Powder metallurgy

questions.question_text: Explain Casting Process? Also explain Centrifugal Casting along with diagrams? Discuss any three casting defects?
Explain the Gating system in any Casting process? Discuss all components and their functions along with the diagram
What is submerged welding process? Explain the principle and its working in detail? Explain different types of joints along with their shapes?
Discuss Solid state welding. Explain in detail EBW and LBW along with their advantages?
What is forging? Explain the principle of forging as a manufacturing method. Also discuss about Drop forging and press forging?
Discuss Two high rolling. Three high rolling and four high rolling along with the diagram? What is extrusion process?
What is powder metallurgy? Explain the detail processing of powder metallurgy alongwith diagrams if any? Explain Atomization process used to produce powder in powder metallurgy?
Differentiate among various additive manufacturing techniques on the basis of the printing materials like powder, liquid resin and polymers
